arts.ttl: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta hints his side suffered a 'serious injury' in fiery 2-2 draw at Man City... with 'a few' of his players set to miss Carabao Cup tie against Bolton
arts.sum: Arsenal were accused of 'dark arts' against Man City but Arteta says there's a serious cause for concern with one of his players and revealed 'a few' will be unavailable for the third round tie against Bolton.

arts.ttl: Who is Kaden Braithwaite? 16-year-old Man City defender in shock debut vs Watford in Carabao Cup
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola handed a shock debut to 16-year-old defender Kaden Braithwaite in the Carabao Cup vs Watford.

arts.ttl: Man City confirmed XI:16-year-old handed senior debut in Watford EFL Cup tie
arts.sum: Sixteen-year-old Kaden Braithwaite will make his senior debut for Manchester City in tonight’s EFL Cup third-round tie against Watford, with Pep Guardiola making a total of nine changes.

arts.ttl: City make nine changes with 16-year-old Braithwaite handed debut
arts.sum: City have made nine changes for tonight’s Carabao Cup clash with Watford with 16-year-old Kaden Braithwaite coming in for his first-team debut. CITY XI: Ortega Moreno, Walker (C), Stones, Braithwaite, Lewis, O’Reilly, Nunes, McAtee, Doku, Grealish, Foden

arts.ttl: Spotted: What Arsenal's Leandro Trossard gestured towards Man City fans after being sent off
Man City have already signed two Rodri replacements to offset huge injury blow
arts.sum: Manchester City are bracing to be without Rodri for a substantial period of time and Pep Guardiola seems to have already made provisions.

arts.ttl: Man City vs Watford LIVE: Carabao Cup team news, line-ups and more
arts.sum: Follow all the action from Etihad Stadium

arts.ttl: Man City vs Watford - Carabao Cup: Live score, team news and updates as Pep Guardiola's side begin their campaign plus updates from Chelsea vs Barrow
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog for the latest scores, team news and updates as Manchester City host Watford and Chelsea take on Barrow in the Carabao Cup.

arts.ttl: Man City's plan to cope without Rodri: Four players in line to replace his role, a change in formation... and could they recall Kalvin Phillips or return for Newcastle's Bruno Guimaraes?
arts.sum: Rodri is arguably City's most important player, dictating the tempo of the game week after week, but Guardiola must now find a different solution in the middle of the park.

arts.ttl: Is VAR used in Carabao Cup as Man City face Watford in third round?
arts.sum: Manchester City are in Carabao Cup third round action this week as they take on Championship side Watford at the Etihad Stadium.
